documentation: This Intel® oneAPI Runtime COMMON LICENSING package contains the Third Party program files and EULA needed to deploy executables to hosts without the Intel® oneAPI development Toolkits. This COMMON LICENSING package should be downloaded and installed along with the COMMON LIBRARIES package and one or more of the Compiler-Specific runtimes.
